State CA; Monthly Participation Summary Report; canonical for CA exemption + registration + savers + AUM; full per-source detail in data/state_admin/CA_detail.csv and methodology/state_admin_collection_log.md
State OR; Quarterly Dashboard; primary OR source for Q2 2025; full per-source detail in data/state_admin/OR_detail.csv and methodology/state_admin_collection_log.md
State IL; Monthly dashboard; canonical for IL employer + saver + AUM; full per-source detail in data/state_admin/IL_detail.csv and methodology/state_admin_collection_log.md

State CT; Press release; sole source for CT cumulative exemption count (10,900); current dashboard at osc.ct.gov/crsp/ does not publish exemptions; full per-source detail in data/state_admin/CT_detail.csv and methodology/state_admin_collection_log.md

State MD; DLS Tax Expenditure Evaluation; primary MD source for SDAT waiver, program-exemption, enrollment; full per-source detail in data/state_admin/MD_detail.csv and methodology/state_admin_collection_log.md

State CO; Treasury annual report April 2024; ~26,000 verified-offer-plan exemptions; updated registration figure 17,025 (Aug 2025 press release); full per-source detail in data/state_admin/CO_detail.csv and methodology/state_admin_collection_log.md

State VA; JLARC presentation; 16,400 funded savers as of May 2025; VA does not publish exemption count; full per-source detail in data/state_admin/VA_detail.csv and methodology/state_admin_collection_log.md

State ME; January 2026 press release; '8,000+ employers registered or exempted' implies ~5,000 exempt; small-denominator caveat (v3 = 143 firms); full per-source detail in data/state_admin/ME_detail.csv and methodology/state_admin_collection_log.md

State DE; Program dashboard; 1,944 registered, 9,219 funded; DE does not publish exemption count; full per-source detail in data/state_admin/DE_detail.csv and methodology/state_admin_collection_log.md

State NJ; Program dashboard; 25,000+ savers / $18M assets (Feb 2026); NJ does not publish exemption count; full per-source detail in data/state_admin/NJ_detail.csv and methodology/state_admin_collection_log.md
